feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Those on the Shrieking Pyre
entry.summary:
Author: lindenwaverly

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,814Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Arthur Pendragon walked through history with fire trailing in his wake. That was the hand that had carved Bayard of Mercia open and left him to die for six days pinned upon his desecrated throne. Those were the eyes that had looked down from the peaks of Mount Wyddfa and seen nothing below him that he could not conquer. The songs called him siegebreaker, earthshaker, battle-ender. Arthur Pendragon, deified and awful, protected by some great work of magic forged at his birth. Arthur Pendragon, whom no weapon forged by man could kill. He had a nice smile. That was the first thing that struck Merlin. All the songs called him handsome, and Merlin could attest to their truth - those ice-blue eyes, that golden hair, that face carved as if from marble. He’d been prepared for that beauty, steeled against it. But he had not been prepared for that smile. It was an amused look, yes, but not coldly distant. It welcomed. It invited shared laughter, understanding, perhaps even the promise of brotherhood. For a second, Merlin could understand why so many men would follow the prince to their deaths.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)

entry.title: somewhere beyond the sea (my lover stands on golden sands)
entry.summary:
Author: highfunctioningclotpole

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,629Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 24

Summary: Merlin has always felt out of place beneath the sea, and far too drawn to the golden-haired king who walks the shoreline. Desperate to be part of Arthur’s world, he makes a dangerous bargain with a sea witch. Arthur brings the mysterious, silent stranger into his castle, never expecting the quiet man from the beach to upend his heart. As their bond deepens, Merlin carries a secret heavy enough to drown them both. Because the sea that Arthur fears is the home Merlin left behind.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: karen rescues a king in central park
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherRogueSelkie

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,638Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 88

Summary: Claire answered the phone grumpily, as she always did. Most of the time, the grumpiness was warranted. “Whaddya want?” she asked. “There’s this guy, sounds German or something but google translate isn’t picking up the language. Pretty sure he said the word Arthur though. And... Myrddin. And Camelot. Context clues, I think he’s claiming to be King Arthur.” “Karen, I swear, if you are prank calling me.”  Merlin and Arthur in the MCU, just trying to live their lives. Featuring: Arthur's *dramatic* return and subsequent rescue from Central Park by Karen Page and a long-suffering Claire Temple, Brett Mahoney investigating that guy working in the morgue who's almost more of a cryptid than Daredevil, Merlin continuing to be lightly stalked by druids, and some actual vigilantes. NOTE: I've set it back to unfinished because I’ve been updating pretty regularly. It’s mostly self-contained stories, there will definitely be more when I get the inspiration and time!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: No more sugarcoating
entry.summary:
Author: wimdsy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,060Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 79

Summary: Basic premise is the Lamia episode, but if it were more violent and Arthur and Merlin were gayer. I don't know how long I am going to make this fic, or when I will post chapters. But I will try to be consistent. I'm bad at summaries, just look at the tags and decide if you want to read it for yourself.

entry.title: those amber eyes
entry.summary:
Author: gowitheflow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,729Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: "You have magic." Arthur declared, eyes wild in his panic. He had seen Merlin. His clumsy body had brushed all inelegance away seamlessly, arm lifting and eyes flashing amber in one movement. Arthur felt a breath at his neck, all too late, before Merlin spoke a forgotten language and snap. A thousand sunrises shone in his eyes as Merlin ruined Arthur's life.or: Merlin has magic and refuses to sleep, and Arthur doesn't deal with either of those things well.

entry.title: Beneath The Same Sky: A Love Is Revealed
entry.summary:
Author: Its_Ivory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,145Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Two young men. Two sides of the same coin. Two destinies intertwined, inseparable from each other, yet they couldn't be more different. Merlin, the personal servant and, coincidentally, arguably the most powerful magician of his time and the one to come. And Arthur, the future king of Camalot and perhaps the only person who has unconsciously made it his life's mission to make Merlin's life a living hell and the worst part is, he does it with a smile. And yet, Arthur is blind to Merlin's magic, for Merlin uses it quite frequently in the young prince's presence. Their paths crossed not too long ago, and since then they've been more or less on the same track. Merlin ensures every day that Arthur's royal backside doesn't meet its demise, while Arthur remains oblivious, believing himself untouchable. So be it... for now.

entry.title: "Who told you that?"
entry.summary:
Author: LoverofMidnight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 300Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: He truly didn’t understand why it was so bad that he just wanted to spend some time with his father on his birthday. To just have one day a year to hear that he was cherished and loved. And it was clear that it wasn’t going to happen.

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,388Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 67

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

entry.title: Shared Assets
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,102Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 133

Summary: Merlin and Arthur had always been like some old married couple, or so everyone said. But this was going a tad too far. What the hell did Merlin mean he had just as much a right to their shared assets as Arthur did? Since when did they share anything!Or the 5 things that Arthur is forced to “share” with Merlin, and the one thing he keeps all to himself. Just kidding, the 5 times Merlin steals Arthur’s shit and the one thing he can’t steal.

Summary: Magic. The word surfaced unbidden in Arthur's mind. His fingers, almost instinctively, began to gently stroke the creature's fur-like hide. More of the luminous powder clung to his skin.

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,935Chapters: 62/?Kudos: 32

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: Two sides of the same coin
entry.summary:
Author: dust_under_the_wardrobe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,787Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 112

Summary: Arthur was born of magic. Merlin was born magic. Merlin was born because of Arthur. Merlin was born FOR Arthur. Everything he'd ever done and will do, was and will be for Arthur. Always.   What happens when Arthur starts to appreciate Merlin and his efforts? What happens, when their emotions run wild and they won't be able to hold them back anymore? What happens when Merlin and Arthur finally give in to their desires and accept their true destiny: to be two sides of the same coin?

entry.title: When Camelot’s need is greatest
entry.summary:
Author: Makkapakkaahhh

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,166Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 4

Summary: A century after Arthur’s death, Merlin is alone and he believes Albion is finally at peace. He’s wrong. When his magic is stolen to resurrect a powerful enemy, Merlin is left for dead. Will Arthur return when he is needed most? And what will it take to restore the once and future king?

entry.title: Suspended by wrists
entry.summary:
Author: LoverofMidnight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 300Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 44

Summary: “Merlin, stop. Uther will kill you if he catches you here.” Arthur leaned forward as far as the chain allowed.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Strange Gravity
entry.summary:
Author: aeternus_diamant

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,052Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Mordred has been quietly, devastatingly in love with Merlin since September — since a guest lecture on myth and memory where Merlin said something offhand and brilliant and Mordred's entire brain rearranged itself. He signed up for Merlin's tutorial section like a man with no self-preservation instincts. Merlin, PhD candidate and professional disaster, is completely oblivious. For now.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,781Chapters: 13/55Kudos: 87

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
